---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include API sketches, config examples, or protocol changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why they're less suitable.

## Scope

- [ ] Control plane only (no wire-format change)
- [ ] Wire-format change (requires common.h + tachyon.h + kmod/mod.c updates)
- [ ] XDP/BPF datapath change
- [ ] CI/tooling only
